title: atropis pauciramea
intro: Atropis pauciramea, also known as the Japanese angelica tree or Chinese angelica tree, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Atropis pauciramea include relief from menstrual cramps, improvement of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and the reduction of fever. Herbal preparations of Atropis pauciramea typically involve drying the root and rhizome, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
